name: Khalti Payment Gateway API
description: Khalti Payment Gateway is a comprehensive payment solution, digital wallet, and API provider designed specifically for online services in Nepal. The API enables merchants to initiate payments, verify transactions, and manage payment lifecycle with API key-based authentication.
